infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 03 - 05 July 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 13:00, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Audi Revolut F1 Team Document 38 Date 04 July 2026 Time 12:45 No / Driver 27 - Nico Hul

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX
03 - 05 July 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 13:00, in relation to the
incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Audi Revolut F1 Team
Document 38
Date 04 July 2026
Time 12:45
No / Driver 27 - Nico Hulkenberg
Reason Alleged Breach of Article B1.8.6 of the FIA F1 Regulations – Leaving the track in Turn
9 at 12:04, without a justifiable reason, and allegedly gaining a lasting advantage.
Gerd Ennser Tanja Geilhausen
Mathieu Remmerie Pedro Lamy
Richard Norbury
